svg.title: Support triage agent architecture diagram
svg.desc: Flowchart showing the full pipeline from CSV input through company classification, corpus routing, safety gate, LLM response generation, and CSV output

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the CSV input contain for the support triage agent?')
sendPrompt('What does the orchestrator do in the support triage agent?')
sendPrompt('What does the pre-screen step do in the support triage agent?')
sendPrompt('How does the company classifier work when company is None or nan?')
sendPrompt('What does the HackerRank corpus contain?')
sendPrompt('What does the Claude support corpus contain?')
sendPrompt('What does the Visa support corpus contain?')
sendPrompt('How does the retriever work in the support triage agent?')
sendPrompt('What triggers escalation in the safety gate?')
sendPrompt('How does the LLM generate grounded responses?')
sendPrompt('What does the output CSV contain for the support triage agent?')
sendPrompt('How are the few-shot examples from sample_support_tickets.csv used?')
sendPrompt('What goes into the system prompt for the triage agent?')
